title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kia India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kia India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
